summary: The diff implements all seven requirements. Backend query functions for stage aggregation and top failing models are added to backend/main.mo. Frontend hooks useRepairsByStage and useTopFailingModels are added to useQueries.ts. Two chart components (RepairsByStageChart.tsx and TopFailingModelsChart.tsx) are created and integrated into DashboardPage.tsx in a two-column grid below KPI cards and above recent records tables. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the evidence available.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration for adding the currentStage field to RepairTicket.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the BuildRequest asked for a data migration module. The requirements only requested backend query functions for aggregation, not a migration system.
